name: cosmicspotlighttabs
title: Cosmic Spotlight Tabs
description: A "God-Tier" Floating Navigation Bar. Features: - Adaptive Volumetric Spotlight: Light color changes to match the icon. - 3D Icon Lift: Active icons are elevated with smooth spring physics. - Crystalline Glass Bar: Premium floating container at the bottom. - Spatial Audio: Integrated humming and click feedback.
